description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a clean, geometric design. The exterior is primarily finished in light gray brick, with large rectangular windows providing ample natural light to the interior. The front features a driveway with a parked car, a garage, and a small landscaped area with a tree and stepping stones leading to the main entrance. The backyard is enclosed by a tan fence and includes a patio area with outdoor furniture and a green lawn. The house has a mix of standard and bay windows, and the rear opens up to a spacious outdoor living area. The overall layout is open and functional, with a focus on outdoor connectivity and contemporary aesthetics.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, a garage, and a landscaped yard with a fenced backyard patio.
description_view_0: Side view showing the garage, driveway, tree, and a partial view of the backyard patio and fence.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the fenced backyard, patio furniture, and large windows opening to the outdoor area.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with the driveway, car, and a clear look at the backyard and side windows.
description_view_3: Front view featuring the main entrance, garage, driveway with car, and landscaped area with a tree and stepping stones.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture and bay windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a single door, no porch, flanked by large windows and accessed via stepping stones through a landscaped area.
